metadata.title: BimDossier
metadata.defaultTitle: BimDossier · snagging and quality control, built on your model
metadata.description: Pin snags on your 3D model or a PDF floor plan, follow them through to fixed with photos as proof, and export a clean report. Built in the Netherlands, with a full Wkb dossier when you need one.

hero.badge: Free to try · still onboarding founding partners in the Netherlands
hero.headline: The building quality platform, built on your model. From first snag to final dossier.
hero.subtitle: Pin every snag on your 3D model, or on a PDF floor plan if you don't have a model yet. Add photos, assign the fix, and follow it through to done. Deadlines track themselves, so your Wkb dossier stays ready from bouwmelding to gereedmelding.
hero.trust: Building it with founding partners in the Netherlands · EU-hosted, GDPR-ready, DPA included · Works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument

features.headline: Everything you need to run quality on your model
features.subtitle: Snagging, inspections, photos, certificates and reports all sit on the same model. When you need it, the full Wkb dossier is there too, from bouwmelding to gereedmelding.

useCases.headline: Same tool, different jobs
useCases.subtitle: Whatever you came for, it runs on the same model.

snagging.title: Snagging
snagging.body: Pin a snag on the model, send it to whoever fixes it, and check it off with a photo.

inspections.title: Inspections
inspections.body: Walk the site, log what you find, and turn the round into a PDF report.

photos.title: Photos
photos.body: Snap photos on site and pin them to the model, so the proof sits where the work happened.

onsite.title: On site
onsite.body: Walk the building with your phone, log what you find, and it's on the model before you leave.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.body: Assign work, leave a note, and keep everyone looking at the same model.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.body: Collect product and install certificates against the project, ready for handover.

handover.title: Handover
handover.body: Hand the client a full record of the work, with every snag and photo in place.

wkb.title: Wkb dossier
wkb.body: The whole Wkb dossier, from bouwmelding to gereedmelding, kept up to date for you.

featureDetail.imagesNote: More screenshots and short videos coming soon.

roadmap.headline: What we're building next
roadmap.subtitle: Already in design or in progress. Not available yet.

comments.title: Finding discussions
comments.body: Comment threads on each finding so your team and kwaliteitsborger can resolve issues in context.

handover.title: Consumentendossier & oplevering
handover.body: Client handover sign-off and proces-verbaal, separate from the dossier bevoegd gezag.

ai.title: AI dossier assistant
ai.body: Ask questions across your documents and drawings. Self-hosted and privacy-first, so your data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

push.title: Mobile push reminders
push.body: Deadline and finding alerts pushed straight to your phone.

howItWorks.headline: From project start to gereedmelding in six steps

step1.title: Create your project
step1.body: Enter the address with Dutch autocomplete, pick the building type and gevolgklasse, and set your planned dates. We compute the deadlines automatically.

step2.title: Upload your model or drawing
step2.body: Drop in your IFC model or a PDF drawing. It opens in the 3D viewer in your browser, ready to walk through and snag on.

step3.title: Snag on the model
step3.body: Log every finding as a point on the model, assign it to your team, and back it with a photo. Each one runs its full lifecycle, from open to verified.

step4.title: Add your documents
step4.body: Certificates, KB documents, supporting drawings: everything the dossier needs in one place. The checklist shows what's still missing.

step5.title: Generate your report
step5.body: When the work checks out, generate the report. It pulls your findings, evidence, and certificates into one file.

step6.title: File on time
step6.body: Email reminders land before every deadline. When it's time, download the complete dossier package and file your gereedmelding at the Omgevingsloket.

cta.headline: Stop chasing paperwork. Prove the work was done right.
cta.subtitle: Upload your model, place your first snags, and watch your project come together. Free to start, no credit card.

blog.headline: Insights & updates
blog.subtitle: Wkb compliance, Dutch building regulations, and product updates, straight from the team building the dossier that runs on your model.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

trust.headline: Built for regulated work, and honest about it
trust.subtitle: Your dossier is legally load-bearing. So here's exactly who builds the platform, where your data lives, and where our responsibility ends.

hosting.title: EU-hosted, DPA included
hosting.body: Your data runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it, in line with the GDPR (AVG). We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with customers on a paid plan.

instrument.title: Works alongside your kwaliteitsborger
instrument.body: BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument and doesn't replace one. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument you already use.

team.title: A Dutch team, reachable
team.body: Built in the Netherlands by the team behind BimDossier. You reach us directly. No ticket queue.

items.q: Is it really free to start?
items.a: Yes. Create an account, upload an IFC model, view it in 3D and place snags, free. The free plan covers a few projects and a gigabyte of storage. The Wkb dossier, compliance reports and certificates are part of the paid plan. No credit card to start.

items.q: What does becoming a founding partner mean for me?
items.a: You can start free without applying. Founding partners go a step further: we onboard a small group of Dutch aannemers by hand, with a direct line to the team and a real say in what we build next. In exchange, we ask for honest real-world feedback.

items.q: Where does my data live, and is there a DPA?
items.a: Everything runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it. We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with customers on a paid plan. Read our DPA for the details.

items.q: Do I need BIM models, or do PDF floor plans work too?
items.a: Both. Pin findings straight onto a PDF plattegrond when that's all you have, or onto a federated IFC model when you've got one. Either way, the dossier works the same.

items.q: Does this replace my kwaliteitsborger or instrument?
items.a: No. BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and any instrument you already use.

items.q: Will it fit the tools I already work with?
items.a: Findings import and export over BCF, so issues round-trip with your kwaliteitsborger's tools instead of living in a silo.

items.q: What does it cost to be a founding partner?
items.a: Founding-partner pricing depends on your team and projects. Start the conversation and we'll talk it through. It commits you to nothing.

metadata.title: Security
metadata.description: How BimDossier protects your data: EU hosting, per-organisation isolation, encryption, hardened authentication and audit logging. Built for legally load-bearing dossiers.

hero.headline: Built for regulated work, and built to keep your data safe
hero.lead: Your dossier is legally load-bearing and has to last for years. Here is exactly how the platform protects it, in plain language, with nothing dressed up.
hero.residency: Hosted on EU infrastructure. Your data stays in the EU and never leaves it.

controls.headline: Security built into every layer
controls.subtitle: Each of these is live in the platform today, not a promise for later.

isolation.title: Your data in its own vault
isolation.body: Every organisation gets its own separate database schema. Your data is physically separated from every other customer, not just filtered by a query, and a database role without extra privileges enforces it.

encryption.title: Encrypted in transit and at rest
encryption.body: Traffic is protected with TLS, and stored files and data are encrypted at rest on EU infrastructure.

auth.title: Hardened sign-in
auth.body: Sessions use short-lived tokens that rotate on every refresh, with automatic detection of stolen tokens. Repeated failed logins lock the account with an increasing wait, and signing out revokes access straight away.

access.title: Least-privilege access
access.body: The app runs as a restricted database role, file storage is scoped per organisation so no request can reach another customer's files, and row-level security guards the shared tables.

audit.title: Every action logged
audit.body: Security-relevant actions are written to an audit trail, and a single request id ties together the logs, the audit record and error monitoring so anything can be traced end to end.

platform.title: A hardened platform
platform.body: Strict content-security and transport headers, rate limiting on sensitive endpoints, and a start-up check that refuses to boot with insecure settings keep the platform locked down by default.

compliance.headline: In line with EU and Dutch rules
compliance.subtitle: We are a processor of your data, and we treat it that way.

residency.title: EU data residency
residency.body: All data is hosted within the EU and never leaves it.

gdpr.title: GDPR / AVG
gdpr.body: Processing follows the GDPR (AVG). You can access, correct, export or delete personal data, and file a complaint with the Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens.

dpa.title: Verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA)
dpa.body: We sign a data processing agreement with every customer. Read it before you commit to anything.

retention.title: Wkb retention
retention.body: Dossier data is kept for the statutory Wkb retention period of ten years after delivery, then returned or deleted.

breach.title: Breach notification
breach.body: If a data breach affects your data, we notify you without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours of becoming aware of it, in line with GDPR Article 33.

boundary.title: An honest boundary
boundary.body: BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument and does not replace your kwaliteitsborger. It runs your dossier alongside the instrument you already use.

disclosure.headline: Found a security issue?
disclosure.body: We welcome reports from security researchers. Email us and we will respond quickly. Please give us a reasonable chance to fix an issue before disclosing it publicly.
